heading: Today
text: Sunshine, mixing with a few afternoon clouds east and north.  Highs in the 60s, reaching the low 70s in the warmer valleys.  Winds light and variable.

heading: Tonight
text: A few evening clouds, then mostly clear.  Lows in the 30s to near 40 east of the Green Mountains, and 40s from the Green Mountains west.  Winds light east, and sheltered valleys west, increasing from the south to 10 mph through the Champlain Valley and over the higher terrain.

heading: Tuesday
text: Sunshine, mixing with increasing afternoon clouds west.  Continued warm.  Highs in the 60s to low 70s.  Winds increasing from the south to southeast 10 to 15 mph, gusting to 25 mph east, and 35 mph through the Champlain Valley.
